segments.speaker: 题目15/16
segments.text: Listen to a conversation. I'm so grateful to you for looking after my dog while I'm in the mountains. I'm happy I can help. How's the planning for your trip coming? I've already booked a flight and a cabin. All I need now is to arrange a rental car. Terrific. How long are you staying? I'll be in the cabin for one week, and then I'll spend another week hiking a trail in the national park. Wow, my vacations are so boring. I really envy you.
